name: Jiangsu Hengrui Medicine Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Hengrui Medicine Co., Ltd., a pharmaceutical company, researches, develops, manufactures, and commercializes medicine worldwide. The company is developing Apatinib, Pyrotinib, Mecapegfilgrastim, SHR3680, SHR3162, SHR9549, SHR2554, SHR1459, SHR-1309, SHR-A1201, Camrelizumab, Famitinib, SHR-1316, SHR-1501, SHR-1603, SHR-1701, SHR-1702, and SHR-A1403 for oncology, metabolic, pain, autoimmune, and other indications. The company was founded in 1970 and is based in Lianyungang, China.
